getAutomationDataObject.description: Returns an object that contains the MIDI automation data.

setAutomationDataFromObject.description: Sets the MIDI automation from the automation data object.

setConsumeAutomatedControllers.description: Sets whether a automated MIDI CC message should be consumed by the automation handler (default is enabled).

setControllerNumberNames.description: Replaces the names in the popup.

setControllerNumbersInPopup.description: Sets the numbers that are displayed in the MIDI automation popup.

setExclusiveMode.description: Enables the "exclusive" mode for MIDI automation (only one active parameter for each controller).

setUpdateCallback.description: Set a function (with one parameter containing the automation data as JSON) that will be executed whenever the MIDI automation changes.
